title: Pan Seared Dutch Fish Skewers
description: A savory and indulgent Dutch dish featuring fish seasoning and score-fat, perfect for a keto-friendly meal. This recipe is a delightful combination of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, mix together fish seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cod fish pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the seasoning mixture.
Thread the fish pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Add the score-fat to the preheated skillet and melt.
Add the fish skewers to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the skillet and place on a plate.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the fish skewers and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
